fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Hawaii Audiologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a audiologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Hawaii - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: audiologist license reciprocity hawaii, how to transfer audiologist license to hawaii, audiologist compact hawaii, hawaii audiologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Hawaii Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs (DCCA)
board.mailing_address:
Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs
Professional and Vocational Licensing Division
P. O. Box 3469
Honolulu, HI 96801

license_types.title: AuD, CCC-A
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a audiologist in Hawaii.

steps.title: Create a MyPVL Account
steps.description: Navigate to the MyPVL portal (pvl.ehawaii.gov/mypvl) and click 'Register A New Account' to establish your user profile.

steps.title: Initiate Application
steps.description: Log in to your newly created MyPVL account and select 'Apply for a New License' to begin the Audiologist licensure application.

steps.title: Complete Application Form
steps.description: Fill out the online application completely, providing all required personal, educational, and professional information within the MyPVL system.

steps.title: Upload Required Documents
steps.description: Digitally upload all necessary supporting documents, such as official transcripts (showing a master's or doctoral degree in audiology), practicum verification forms, proof of ASHA CCC-A certification (or equivalent), and a valid government-issued identification, to your MyPVL application.

steps.title: Pay Application Fees
steps.description: Submit the non-refundable application fee (and any applicable biennial renewal fee for endorsement) securely through the MyPVL system using a credit card.

steps.title: Submit and Monitor Application
steps.description: Submit your completed application via MyPVL and regularly check your MyPVL account for status updates or requests for additional information from the Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the Praxis. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Hawaii audiologist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Hawaii have reciprocity for audiologists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers audiologist practice in Hawaii. To work in Hawaii, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my audiologist license to Hawaii?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Hawaii while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Audiologist in Hawaii
hero.dek: To apply for an Audiologist license in Hawaii, applicants must use the state's online licensing portal, MyPVL, to submit their application and supporting documents.

official_links.registration_steps: Click on 'Register A New Account' to create your MyPVL user profile. Once registered, log in to your account and select 'Apply for a New License' to begin the Audiologist application.
